hero.heading: Sail into the Heart of Paradise
hero.tagline: Discover the Maldives aboard Azalea — an intimate luxury yacht offering bespoke island-hopping adventures through the world's most pristine waters.

about.heading: Where Luxury Meets the Open Sea
about.body_1: Azalea Cruise was born from a deep love of the Maldives and a desire to share its extraordinary beauty in the most intimate way possible. Our handcrafted itineraries take you far beyond the resort islands, into untouched atolls and coral sanctuaries few visitors ever witness.
about.body_2: Aboard our meticulously appointed yacht, every detail is considered — from sunrise dive expeditions and sunset dolphin cruises to private beach dinners under a canopy of stars. This is the Maldives as it was meant to be experienced.

experiences.title: Reef & Dive
experiences.description: Explore vibrant coral gardens with expert guides in crystal-clear Maldivian waters.

experiences.title: Private Dining
experiences.description: Bespoke seafood menus prepared by our chef, served on secluded sandbars at sunset.

experiences.title: Dolphin Cruise
experiences.description: Sail at golden hour alongside spinner dolphins in their natural Maldivian habitat.

experiences.title: Island Hopping
experiences.description: Chart a course through remote atolls, local fishing villages and pristine beaches.

experiences.title: Deck Wellness
experiences.description: Sunrise yoga, in-cabin massages and wellness rituals designed for total rejuvenation.

experiences.title: Stargazing at Sea
experiences.description: Far from city lights, experience some of the world's most breathtaking night skies.

yacht.heading: The Azalea
yacht.body_1: A masterpiece of naval craftsmanship, Azalea was purpose-built for the Maldivian archipelago. Her shallow draft allows access to the most secluded lagoons, while her spacious decks and refined interiors ensure your comfort never wavers.
yacht.body_2: Accommodating up to eight guests in four elegantly appointed cabins, every inch of Azalea reflects our commitment to providing an unparalleled experience at sea.

testimonials.quote: Seven days aboard Azalea was the most extraordinary travel experience of my life. The crew's knowledge of the Maldives is unparalleled — every dive site, every sandbar felt like a secret only they knew.
testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell

testimonials.quote: The private sandbar dinner was like something out of a dream. Our chef prepared fresh lobster as the sun melted into the Indian Ocean. Azalea turns the Maldives into pure magic.
testimonials.name: James & Priya Kumar

testimonials.quote: We've visited the Maldives three times before, but Azalea showed us a version we never knew existed. The remote atolls, the silence, the stars at night — it was deeply humbling.
testimonials.name: Emma Thornton

booking.heading: Begin Your Voyage
booking.body_1: Every Azalea experience is fully bespoke. Share your vision and our team will craft a tailor-made itinerary, from one night to a full week exploring the archipelago at your own pace.
booking.body_2: Charters are available for couples, families and small groups of up to eight guests. We operate year-round across all Maldivian atolls.
